records.ety: [L., an under garment, fr. induere to put on: cf. F. indusie the covering of the seed spots of ferns.]

defs: A collection of hairs united so as to form a sort of cup, and inclosing the stigma of a flower.
The immediate covering of the fruit dots or sori in many ferns, usually a very thin scale attached by the middle or side to a veinlet.
A peculiar covering found in certain fungi.
